message.content: @startuml title Mojaloop transaction: Discovery actor Alice participant "DFSP A\n(Payer)" as DFSPA participant Switch database ALS participant "DFSP B\n(Payee)" as DFSB actor Bob Alice ->> DFSPA : I'd like to send $100 to Bob@Somewhere activate DFSPA note right of DFSPA #D3F8C9 Which DFSP owns Bob@Somewhere? (GET /parties) end note DFSPA --> Switch : GET http://switch/parties/Bob%40somewhere/MSISDN Switch -[#green]> DFSPA : HTTP 202 Accepted \nLocation:/parties/{id} deactivate DFSPA Activate switch Note over Switch,ALSB #FFF5CC Which DFSP owns Bob@Somewhere?\n/participants/msisdn\nisdfsp=true¤cy=USD End Note Switch <-> ALSB : POST participants msisdns/bobsomewhere/isfsp\ncurrency = USD & type=dfsp_id Deactivate switch ALS -->> Switch : It's dfspb.com DFSBA <-[hidden]---> ALSSwitch Activate dfsba dfsba <-- Switch : Do you speak for bob@somehwere ? Switch -[#blue]-> DfsBa : PUT parties {ID}\ntype MSISDN/id value bobsomehere/name alice smith/fspiops-source dfspa DfSBA- [#red]> SWITCH : Http 202 accepted location:\nhttp:///dfsb.parties.id DEACTIVATE SWITCh NOTE OVER DFSBB#FFBBBB Retrieve customer information from core banking system or CRM using internal API call. This step will be specific to each implementation.\nThe response should contain first name,last namemiddle initial,dateof birth etc.. If not found return error message accordingly else continue next steps below... END NOTE autonumber "**" "" loop For i := 1 To N do alt condition met then action taken endif; if successful operation performed successfully completed task finished job done work accomplished goal
